Voyage Profile — Energy Distribution (%)
FuelEU scope ratios: Intra-EU: 100% · Extra-EU: 50% · EU Berth: 100% · OMR: 50% · Non-EU: 0%. Total must equal 100%.

⚖️
Run calculation first.
Add Vessel to Pool — Selected Year: 2025
Pool is empty — add a vessel.
Pooling Rules — FuelEU Art. 21(4):
Rule 1: Total pool compliance balance must be positive.
Rule 2: Deficit vessels must not increase their deficit after pooling.
Rule 3: Surplus vessels must not fall into deficit after pooling.

⚠ Vessels using borrowing in the same period cannot join a pool · Deadline: 30 April 2026
FuelEU GHG Intensity Limits — 2025 → 2050
This Vessel's Projection (assuming current fuel mix remains constant)
🚢 Add Voyage Record
Record each voyage separately. FuelEU scope is applied automatically by voyage type (100% Intra-EU, 50% Extra-EU/OMR, 0% Exempt). All voyages are aggregated into the annual summary.

➕ Add Vessel
Add a vessel to the fleet list. Custom vessels are stored locally and persist between sessions.
💾 Backup & Restore
Download a full JSON backup of all data (vessels, notes, certificates, orders). You can reload this file to restore any snapshot — works independently of the cloud.
ℹ Backup includes: vessel data, superintendent notes, certificate dates, ROB, orders and emission records.
Restoring will overwrite current data. A cloud sync will be triggered automatically after restore.
